The five itineraries span both the Western and Eastern Mediterranean, offering a chance to experience the region through a relaxed, late-season lens.

Enhancements across suites, public spaces, dining venues and the spa create a more relaxed and refined onboard experience, further elevating the sense of comfort and understated luxury guests know and value.

items.title: Princess Cruises Announces Largest- Ever Europe Season for 2028
items.summary: Princess Cruises unveils its most expansive Europe season for 2028, with 291 departures across 150 unique itineraries aboard six ships sailing throughout Northern Europe, the Mediterranean and on Transatlantic voyages.

items.title: Carnival Corporation Brings Cruise Industry's First LNG Bunkering to Latin America & Western Caribbean

items.summary: Holland America Line is introducing year-round cruising in Europe, expanding its presence in the region with an extended 2027-2028 season sailing through winter. items.title: Consumers Energy Expands Line Clearing Efforts to Strengthen Reliability and Safety Across Michigan
items.summary: Consumers Energy is expanding its line clearing efforts, with crews working across more than 9,000 miles of power lines this year to secure the power grid and protect public safety across Michigan.

items.title: Consumers Energy Expands Outreach Across Michigan, Helping Customers Manage and Pay Bills
items.summary: Consumers Energy continues to expand its direct outreach to Michigan customers, reaching over 30,000 people directly this year through phone calls and in-person events around the state.

items.title: CMS Energy Declares Quarterly Dividend on Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock
items.summary: The Board of Directors of CMS Energy has declared a dividend on the 4.200% Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series C of the Corporation.

items.title: Consumers Energy, the Principal Subsidiary of CMS Energy, Declares Quarterly Dividend on Preferred Stock
items.summary: The Board of Directors of Consumers Energy, the principal subsidiary of CMS Energy, has declared a quarterly dividend on the utility's preferred stock.

items.title: CMS Energy Announces First Quarter Results for 2026, Reaffirms 2026 Adjusted EPS Guidance
items.summary: CMS Energy announced today reported earnings per share of $1.10 for the first quarter of 2026, compared to $1.01 per share for 2025. The company's adjusted earnings per share for the first quarter were $1.13, compared to $1.02 per share for 2025.

items.title: New Weather Stations Help Consumers Energy Restore Power Faster, Improve Safety, and Reduce Storm Costs
items.summary: Consumers Energy expects to better predict outages and respond to storms with new company-owned weather stations across Michigan, providing more precise, real-time data directly from the electric grid.

items.title: Consumers Energy Expands Efforts to Provide Energy Savings to Vulnerable Customers in Michigan
items.summary: Consumers Energy announced today it is strengthening its commitment to reducing costs for vulnerable customers. The company is increasing spending to connect income-qualified customers with energy-saving programs by $22 million by 2030.

items.title: Consumers Energy Tells State Commission: Sale of 13 Hydroelectric Dams Is Best Option for Michigan
items.summary: Consumers Energy officials told a state commission today that selling 13 hydroelectric dams remains the best option for Michigan, supporting local communities and offering the lowest long-term cost for customers.

items.title: CMS Energy to Announce 2026 First Quarter Results on April 28
items.summary: CMS Energy announced today it will provide 2026 first quarter results along with a business and financial outlook at 10:00 a.m. EDT on Tuesday, April 28, 2026.

items.title: Consumers Energy's Reliability Action Plan Provides Dollars to Power a Stronger Michigan Electric Grid
items.summary: Consumers Energy today received the green light to carry out new upgrades to secure Michigan's electric grid, a major investment that will keep the lights on more dependably for close to 2 million Michigan homes and businesses.

items.title: Consumers Energy Unveils Electric Supply Plan to Keep Energy Reliable and Bills Lower
items.summary: Consumers Energy announced today that its upcoming Integrated Resource Plan (IRP) will include an all-of-the-above approach to how we supply electricity with over 13 GW in expanded renewables and clean energy resources including solar, battery storage, and wind supported by two new natural gas plants generating 1.5 GW.

items.title: CMS Energy Announces Diane Leopold and Richard Keyes to Join the Board of Directors

Richard Keyes, president and chief executive officer of Meijer, Inc, has also been elected to the CMS Energy and Consumers Energy boards of directors. Both appointments are effective February 20, 2026.

items.title: Reliability Roadmap by the Numbers: 2,700 Electric Reliability Improvements Powered by Customers' Investments in 2025
items.summary: Consumers Energy is looking back on a year of major grid improvements as crews across Michigan completed thousands of projects in 2025 to strengthen the electric system, reducing outages, restoring power faster and helping control costs for customers. These upgrades reflect our commitment to investing customers' dollars wisely in work that improves their experience even as severe weather intensified statewide.

items.title: Consumers Energy Promotes Home Heating Credit to Help Customers Pay Energy Bills
items.summary: Now that tax season is here, Consumers Energy is preparing and supporting customers by helping them to apply for the Michigan Home Heating Credit. The annual credit helps thousands of households manage their expenses each year, providing an average benefit of nearly $200.

items.title: Consumers Energy Shields Customers from Michigan's Worst Weather in Generations

items.title: Despite Winter Chill, Consumers Energy Connects Customers to Dollars to Reduce Heating Costs

Consumers Energy last year helped over 140,000 customers obtain $60 million to pay energy bills. We are working with customers now to get even more assistance to them – over $100 million is available statewide – in the new year.

items.summary: PolyAI, the Agentic Dialog Platform for building the conversational enterprise, today opened its platform to every builder. Free for the first two months, the technology powering the world's most demanding customer conversations across 75 languages and 25 countries is now available to any team with an idea and an email address.

items.title: ESTUARY POWER ACHIEVES FINAL COMPLETION OF ESCAPE SOLAR AND STORAGE PROJECT AND BEGINS SUPPLYING MGM RESORTS INTERNATIONAL
items.summary: Estuary Power achieved final completion of all phases of its Escape Solar and Storage project in Lincoln County, Nevada in December 2025. Escape is now supplying 185 megawatts ("MW") of solar energy and 400 megawatt-hours ("MWh") of battery storage capacity to four Nevada customers.
